categories: Plant-based foods and beverages,Plant-based foods,Fruits and vegetables based foods,Snacks,Salty snacks,Fruits based foods,Nuts and their products,Dried products,Nuts,Dried plant-based foods,Dried fruits,Dried pineapple,Raisins,Shelf-stable prepared fruit nuts and seeds Mixes
creator: odinh
ingredients_text: Roasted peanuts (25%), jumbo raisins (25%) (raisins (99.5%), sunflower oil), cashew nuts (25%), candied pineapple (25%) (pineapple (51%), cane sugar (48%), acidity regulator (citric acid), preservative (sulphur dioxide)). May also contain other nuts, sesame seeds, soya, milk.
